victim.value: Palash Datta, who died while acting in the film 'Ghost House'
victim.quote: Palash Datta has been dead for 2 weeks now

closed_world.value: Anjanpara bazaar and graveyard area where the film crew operates

resolution.value: Discovery that Palash Datta is dead, revealed by his gravestone
resolution.quote: Palash Datta 1978-2012 Died while acting in the film 'Ghost House'

investigator.value: Nirmal Sen, an unwitting participant who discovers the supernatural truth
investigator.quote: Nirmal failed to hear the last part of Chandrasekhar's question, for he was running to the tree.

red_herring.value: The entire ghost encounter and horror movie setup serves as elaborate misdirection from the supernatural truth that Palash Datta was actually dead
red_herring.quote: Of course!' roared the director in laughter. 'When you are into your role, you need to be completely in it.

clue_fairness.value: The reader receives the same information as Nirmal - Palash's instructions, the graveyard setting, and the reveal of his death simultaneously
clue_fairness.quote: Palash Datta has been dead for 2 weeks now – his grave is just beside that big banyan tree

social_world.value: Film industry hierarchy with director, crew, and actors; local bazaar community; workplace tensions between Nirmal and Adrik Mitra
social_world.quote: Today was another day of hard work at office, ending with a phenomenon now common at his office

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence of the tombstone inscription provides concrete proof that contradicts the rational film explanation
reveal_mechanic.quote: Palash Datta 1978-2012 Died while acting in the film 'Ghost House' R.I.P

media_and_audience.value: The film crew exploits supernatural folklore and horror movie tropes to manipulate both Nirmal and the audience's expectations
media_and_audience.quote: Suddenly the paraphernalia of horror moves became a fragment of reality

investigator_wound.value: Nirmal's skepticism about ghosts and his need to prove himself through accepting challenges makes him vulnerable to manipulation
investigator_wound.quote: This was Nirmal's firm belief that ghosts never did exist
